title: Binance Launches US Stock Trading and Plans Tokenized Stocks
summary: Binance has launched US equities trading for eligible users and announced plans for tokenized stocks, marking a major push beyond crypto into traditional financial markets. This move allows crypto users to trade stocks directly on Binance's platform, potentially lowering barriers to entry for new investors.
body:
Binance has launched US equities trading for eligible users and announced plans for tokenized stocks, marking a push beyond crypto into traditional financial markets. The new stock trading feature is available to eligible users, allowing them to trade major US equities directly on the Binance platform. This expansion integrates traditional financial markets with crypto, as Binance also confirmed plans to introduce tokenized stocks, which would represent fractional ownership of real-world equities on the blockchain, enabling 24/7 trading and potentially lower fees.

The service is currently available to users in select regions, with plans to roll out more widely. Binance has partnered with traditional financial institutions to ensure compliance and provide a seamless trading experience. The stock trading feature offers access to 245 tradable US stocks, giving crypto users more investment options without needing a separate brokerage account.

This expansion could make investing more accessible to crypto users who may not have traditional brokerage accounts. It also signals a growing trend of crypto exchanges diversifying their offerings. For everyday users, this means more investment options within a single platform, simplifying portfolio management.

Binance's move into tokenized stocks could democratize access to high-value equities by allowing fractional ownership. Users should watch for the official launch of tokenized stocks, as this could open up new investment opportunities and further blur the lines between traditional and crypto markets.
twitterThread: Binance has launched US equities trading for eligible users, with tokenized stocks coming soon. 📈💎
This move bridges crypto and traditional finance, offering more investment options in one place. Users can access 245 US stocks directly on Binance.

If you're a Binance user, keep an eye out for the tokenized stocks launch. It could change how you invest. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-01-binance-expands-into-us-stock-trading-plans-tokenized-shares
standaloneTweet: Binance now offers US equities trading and plans tokenized stocks, making it easier to invest in traditional markets from a crypto platform. 📈
